symptom: a swallowed object after a dare went too far and no pain so far
hook: a small rectangular piece of metal with a closed loop was sitting inside the stomach
whatYouSee: A small rectangular metal padlock with its shackle still closed sitting inside the stomach.
whyItMatters: An object with a rounded body like this can often pass on its own but its hard edges and hinge raise the risk of it catching partway through the gut.
treatment: Most objects this size pass on their own so watch it with repeat X-rays and remove it by endoscope only if it stalls.
takeaway: Some doors lock from the inside. This one locked from the inside of a stomach.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a swallowed object after a dare went too far and no pain so far.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a small rectangular piece of metal with a closed loop was sitting inside the stomach.

Case #72 🩻 Difficulty 2/5

Medics: your diagnosis?

Everyone else: Would you have swallowed this on a dare?

Answer in 45 min 👀 no spoilers from me till then
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Swallowed padlock

👀 What you see:
A small rectangular metal padlock with its shackle still closed sitting inside the stomach.

🦴 Why it matters:
An object with a rounded body like this can often pass on its own but its hard edges and hinge raise the risk of it catching partway through the gut.

💊 Treatment:

Most objects this size pass on their own so watch it with repeat X-rays and remove it by endoscope only if it stalls.

seedHint: Look at that loop. Is it open or closed and does that change anything?
